boMisc.importInstr4Text: Validate the file to detect conflicts before importing.

boMisc.importSimulationNoChanges: This is only a simulation - no changes have been saved

boMisc.importUnrecognizedFormat: Unrecognized file format. It must be an array, an object with a "data" property, or an object with "id" and "name/title/slug".

boMisc.importWpInstr4Text: Check the results and review any reported errors.
boMisc.importWpNoteText: Records that already exist in the database (by slug or ID) will be automatically skipped. The import is safe to run multiple times.
